title: Singapore companies: higher enterprise presence, hybrid-dominant, financial hub
summary: Singapore shows a more mature market with 32.8% enterprise (vs 20.8% regional), 21.8% startup (vs 30.3%), and 7.5% government (vs 4.9%). Industry: Financial services ecosystem at 26.9% combined across banking, insurance, financial services (vs 14.8% regional), Tech at 32.8%, Public sector 10.3%. Fewer solo designers at 13.8% (vs 22.6% regional). Larger average design team sizes. Hybrid work at 70.1% (vs 36% regional), remote at 14.4% (vs 24.9%).
methodology: Self-reported company type, industry, team size, and work arrangement in anonymous online survey, filtered to Singapore-based respondents
